name: Emma Smith DeVoe
summary: Emma Smith DeVoe was an American women suffragist in the early twentieth century, changing the face of politics for both women and men alike. With May Arkwright Hutton, she led Washington's final women's suffrage movement. When she died, the Tacoma News Tribune called her Washington state's "Mother of Women's Suffrage".
original_caption: Emma Smith DeVoe by James & Bushnell - No photographer stamp
